body:
## Scope

This specification defines the canonical workspace package-dependency DAG for this repository.

## Workspace Nodes

- `ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-views`
- `ssot-codegen`
- `ssot-core`
- `ssot-registry`
- `ssot-cli`
- `ssot-tui`

## Canonical Directed Edges

- `ssot-views -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-codegen -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-codegen -> ssot-views`
- `ssot-core -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-core -> ssot-views`
- `ssot-cli -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-cli -> ssot-core`
- `ssot-tui -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-tui -> ssot-core`
- `ssot-registry -> ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-registry -> ssot-core`
- `ssot-registry -> ssot-cli`

## Rules

1. The workspace package set SHALL match the canonical node set above.
2. Package manifests and workspace configuration SHALL realize only the governed edges above unless this specification is updated.
3. Release-train policy and package-boundary policy SHALL remain consistent with this DAG.
4. Any change to a package node or dependency edge SHALL update the governed DAG inventory feature in the registry.

## Enforcement

- Root workspace membership in `pyproject.toml` SHALL match the canonical node set.
- Per-package dependency declarations SHALL remain consistent with the canonical edge set.
- Architectural changes to the DAG SHALL update the ADR, this SPEC, and the registry feature inventory together.
summary: This specification defines the canonical workspace package-dependency DAG for this repository.
title: Workspace package-dependency DAG
